description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:latest Docker image, with a global before_script that runs npm install and caches the node_modules directory. Define three stages: test, deploy, and clean_up. In the test stage add a lint job that runs npm run lint. In the clean_up stage add a clean_up_job that runs rm -rf node_modules and rm -rf ~/.node-gyp and is configured to run only on failure (when: on_failure). No artifacts, services, or deployment targets are defined, and the deploy stage is present but empty.
